holdings.infoBox: PFOE is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.99%, UnitedHealth Group at 6.71%, Alphabet at 6.15%, Universal Music Group at 5.90%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.87%.

overview.description: The Pathfinder Focused Opportunities ETF (PFOE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund uses fundamental, bottom-up research to build a US equity concentrated, non-diversified portfolioenabling high-conviction positions. The fund aims to actively invest in US companies positioned with a competitive advantage and steady returns. PFOE was launched on Dec 31, 2025 and is issued by Pathfinder.
